docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY SRIVASTAVA, SUNITA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLY FINANCIAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ALLY FINANCIAL INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLY FINANCIAL INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLY FINANCIAL INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$125.00);SUBMITTED ALSO FOR OTHER DOCUMENTS:SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA SERVED AUG-30-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLY FINANCIAL INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE.PLAINTIFF SUNITA SRIVASTAVA NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLY FINANCIAL INC. REPRESENTED BY, JASPER GARRETT ASSOCIATE ANALYST IS PRESENT.DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.NO APPEARANCE MADE BY PLAINTIFF.
EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
